steps.description: Promote high-value raw TEXT columns to real types.
steps.rule_summary: pd.to_datetime / pd.to_numeric on the listed raw columns (errors->NaT/NaN).

steps.description: Flag the canonical row per incident without dropping rows.
Append cleaned org/state columns, master_entity and Make Model.
steps.rule_summary: Run every treatment in this module against *df* and return a frame with cleaned columns appended alongside the originals.

steps.description: Harmonize automation engagement across schema versions.
steps.rule_summary: Add automation_engaged_clean {Engaged, Not Engaged, Unknown} and automation_system_type {ADS, ADAS, Unknown}.
steps.caveat: Semantic mismatch across versions: the early schema's 'Automation System Engaged?' encodes which system was involved (ADS/ADAS), while the later schema's 'Engagement Status' encodes the engagement state (Verified Engaged / Not Engaged). automation_engaged_clean folds both into an engagement state and is additive -- the raw columns are retained.

steps.description: Harmonize passenger belt status across schema versions.
steps.rule_summary: Add passengers_belted_clean {All Belted, No Passengers, Not Belted, Unknown}. Combines early 'SV Were All Passengers Belted?' and later 'Were All Passengers Belted?'.

steps.description: Harmonize weather flags onto a shared vocabulary.
steps.rule_summary: Add weather_*_clean boolean flags. Cross-version pairs are OR-ed onto a shared vocabulary; later-only categories are carried as their own flags.

steps.description: Harmonize roadway condition flags across schema versions.
steps.rule_summary: Add roadway_*_clean boolean condition flags. Early text columns ('Roadway Surface' / 'Roadway Description') are matched against the later schema's 'Roadway-*' boolean flags where they correspond. 'Roadway Type' is shared and kept as-is (no harmonized column).

steps.description: Carry the early-only Lighting column to lighting_clean.
steps.rule_summary: Add lighting_clean from the early-only 'Lighting' column. Later-schema rows (no source column) get NULL (see LIGHTING_CAVEAT).
steps.caveat: Lighting is present only in the early schema; later-schema rows have no source column and receive NULL for lighting_clean.

steps.rule_summary: Append every candidate target to *df* and return the result.
